name: Capulet
bio: CAPULET is Cathy Shim, Jed Alcantara, Keiko Agena, Rosie Narasaki and Will Choi. The genre is Monoscene, the style is grounded, the people are Asian, and the friendships are freaking adorable. It’s an LA team by way of South Korea, Riverside, San Francisco, Hawaii, and LA. Chat GPT was not used to create this bio except when it was.

name: Asian Improv Near Me
bio: Asian Improv Near Me is a dynamic improv comedy group bringing laughter and spontaneity to audiences. Their high-energy performances showcase creativity, quick wit, and strong ensemble chemistry.
